# command-naming

Command files should use kebab-case naming

| | |
|---|---|
| **Severity** | warning |
| **Autofix** | auto |
| **Since** | v0.1.0 |
| **Category** | [Command Format](command-format.md) |

## Configuration

```yaml
rules:
  command-naming:
    enabled: true  # true | false | auto
    severity: warning
```


*Run `skillsaw explain command-naming` to see this documentation and the rule's effective configuration in your terminal.*
